                        Рћѓ     Рћю Fingerprint     : sha256:94656683cce554469f1052fcc38278707047ecbae344d41f417879
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   4553d1c352 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Title           : jackson-databind: jackson-databind: Ignored properties can be
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    unexpectedly modified 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Description     : jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    2.8.0 until 2.18.9, 2.21.5, and 3.1.4, in
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   BeanDeserializerBase.createContextual(), per-property
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   @JsonIgnoreProperties exclusions are applied by
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   _handleByNameInclusion(), producing a contextual deserializer
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    whose BeanPropertyMap has the ignored properties removed.
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   The subsequent per-property case-insensitivity block
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   (triggered by
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   @JsonFormat(ACCEPT_CASE_INSENSITIVE_PROPERTIES)) rebuilds
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   from this._beanProperties (the original, unfiltered map)
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   instead of contextual._beanProperties, then overwrites the
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   filtered map Рђћ restoring every property
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   _handleByNameInclusion had just removed. The ignored property
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    becomes writable again. This vulnerability is fixed in
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   2.18.9, 2.21.5, and 3.1.4. 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Severity        : MEDIUM 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю CweIDs           Рћђ [0]: CWE-915 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю VendorSeverity   РЋГ amazon: 3 
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                  Рћю ghsa  : 2 
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                  РЋ░ redhat: 2

                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                          osystem%3Amaven 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Fingerprint     : sha256:10f552867fcd4fcd7b92dc85d902f5d326813e63c51bd7ebaeacc4
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   c7ce383954 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Title           : jackson-databind: jackson-databind: Security bypass due to
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   improper handling of renamed properties 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Description     : jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    2.21.0 until 2.21.4 and 3.1.4,
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   POJOPropertiesCollector._renameProperties() allows a property
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    with @JsonProperty("renamed") on the getter and @JsonIgnore
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   on the setter to be renamed rather than dropped. With
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   MapperFeature.INFER_PROPERTY_MUTATORS enabled (default), the
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   private backing field is retained; during deserialization
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   BeanDeserializerFactory.addBeanProps() sees hasField()==true,
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    builds a FieldProperty, and makes the backing field
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   writable. An attacker supplying the renamed JSON key writes
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   the backing field directly, bypassing the @JsonIgnore on the
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   setter. This vulnerability is fixed in 3.1.4. 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Severity        : MEDIUM 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю CweIDs           Рћђ [0]: CWE-915 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю VendorSeverity   РЋГ ghsa  : 2

                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                           Рћѓ           A:N

                        Рћѓ     Рћю SeveritySource  : ghsa 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю PrimaryURL      : https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2026-54517 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю DataSource       РЋГ ID  : ghsa 
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                  Рћю Name: GitHub Security Advisory Maven 
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                  РЋ░ URL : https://github.com/advisories?query=type%3Areviewed+ec
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                          osystem%3Amaven 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Fingerprint     : sha256:930158130e7660a5de74aeb1de4bc17c994f7b60b8e80bdab45d11
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   da37b23a6b 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Title           : jackson-databind: jackson-databind: Information disclosure
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   via improper JsonView filter application 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Description     : jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                    2.21.0 until 2.21.4 and 3.1.4, in
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   BeanDeserializer._deserializeUsingPropertyBased, the
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   active-view (@JsonView) filter was applied only to creator
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   properties; the regular property-buffering branch performed
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   no prop.visibleInView(activeView) check. A change making
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   SetterlessProperty.isMerging() return true routed setterless
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   Collection/Map properties through this unguarded path, so a
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   setterless collection annotated with a restricted @JsonView
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   is populated from attacker JSON even when the active view
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   excludes it. This vulnerability is fixed in 2.21.4 and
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                   3.1.4. 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю Severity        : MEDIUM 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю CweIDs           Рћђ [0]: CWE-863 
                        Рћѓ     Рћю VendorSeverity   РЋГ ghsa  : 2 
                        Рћѓ     Рћѓ                  РЋ░ redhat: 2

                              Рћю DataSource       РЋГ ID  : ghsa 
                              Рћѓ                  Рћю Name: GitHub Security Advisory Maven 
                              Рћѓ                  РЋ░ URL : https://github.com/advisories?query=type%3Areviewed+ec
                              Рћѓ                          osystem%3Amaven 
                              Рћю Fingerprint     : sha256:4357f7c0e714bb27c3c76f4bfdccaddd9979b0ffbd8b286dae238c
                              Рћѓ                   8efc7fcad7 
                              Рћю Title           : jackson-databind: jackson-databind: Information disclosure
                              Рћѓ                   and data manipulation via view-based access control bypass 
                              Рћю Description     : jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding
                              Рћѓ                   functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From
                              Рћѓ                    2.21.0 until 2.21.4 and 3.1.4,
                              Рћѓ                   UnwrappedPropertyHandler.processUnwrappedCreatorProperties()
                              Рћѓ                   replays buffered JSON into creator parameters but never
                              Рћѓ                   consults prop.visibleInView(activeView). The normal
                              Рћѓ                   property-based creator path gates creator properties on the
                              Рћѓ                   active view, but this unwrapped-creator replay path bypasses
                              Рћѓ                   that check, so a constructor parameter annotated with both
                              Рћѓ                   @JsonView(AdminView.class) and @JsonUnwrapped is populated
                              Рћѓ                   from attacker JSON even when a more restrictive view is
                              Рћѓ                   active. This vulnerability is fixed in 2.21.4 and 3.1.4. 
                              Рћю Severity        : MEDIUM 
                              Рћю CweIDs           Рћђ [0]: CWE-863
